prompt: A spectacular luxury hotel marketing photograph designed to inspire immediate booking desire, a breathtaking wide interior shot of an ultra-premium overwater villa suite at a five-star Maldivian resort at golden hour, the suite's entire front wall consisting of floor-to-ceiling retractable glass panels fully open to the outside merging the interior seamlessly with the natural environment, inside the suite a king-size bed dressed in crisp white Egyptian cotton linen with precisely arranged decorative cushions faces directly toward the open ocean view, a white linen daybed and two champagne glasses with a sweating ice bucket on a low teak side table positioned at the very edge where the polished white marble interior floor transitions to the natural teak deck outside, the deck extending directly over the impossibly transparent turquoise lagoon water below where the sandy bottom is clearly visible through the crystal clear shallow water, a private infinity pool at the deck edge filled with water the exact color of the lagoon blending perfectly with the ocean horizon beyond, the horizon itself a flawless deep gradient from rich amber at the waterline through burning coral orange to deep violet at the top where the first evening star is just becoming visible, warm golden hour light flooding every white surface of the suite interior with rich amber radiance, professional luxury hospitality photography quality, 16:9 landscape ratio
